name: captcha-ocr-tfjs
description: TensorFlow.js captcha OCR trainer and inference tools for five-digit captchas using labels 1-9.

scripts.check: node --check src/dependencies.js && node --check src/image-utils.js && node --check src/ocr.js && node --check src/tf.js && node --check src/tfjs-io.js && node --check scripts/train.js && node --check scripts/predict.js && node --check scripts/solve-file.js && node --check test/smoke.js
